title: Faster Happy Ghasts Enchantment!
description: A simple datapack which adds an enchantment that increases Happy Ghast flight speed.
body:
This simple datapack adds a new enchantment for Happy Ghast harnesses called **Swift Flight** which allows them to fly up to 1.5x their normal speed normally, and adds a sprinting mode which allows them to fly up to 2.15x their normal speed. It is obtainable from Nether Fortress chests at a 10% chance, and has a max level of 3.

This datapack is part of the larger (WIP) Vaulted Echoes datapack, but this can still be used as a standalone pack.
